name: jw-mcp
description: MCP server for JW.org content: Bible scripture lookup with study content, workbook materials, Watchtower articles, and video captions

tools.name: search_bible_books
tools.description: Search for Bible books by name, abbreviation, or number

tools.name: get_bible_verse
tools.description: Get plain Bible verse text from wol.jw.org

tools.name: get_verse_with_study
tools.description: Get comprehensive study content for Bible verses including study notes, cross-references, and research articles

tools.name: get_bible_verse_url
tools.description: Generate JW.org URLs for Bible verses, ranges, or chapters

tools.name: getWorkbookLinks
tools.description: Get available Christian Life and Ministry workbook weeks

tools.name: getWorkbookContent
tools.description: Download and parse workbook content to clean plain text

tools.name: getWatchtowerContent
tools.description: Download and parse Watchtower article content to clean plain text

tools.name: get_jw_captions
tools.description: Fetch video captions and metadata from JW.org
